OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Clincnian_AtGlanceOnbaordingCaseIP

childElements.name: GetAccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "QueryId" : "=QUERY(\"Select AccountId from User where Id = '{0}'\",%UserId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "QueryId", "responseJSONNode" : "AccountId", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues5", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ExternalUser
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ProfileName%==\"Core HC Customer Community Login User\" || %ProfileName%==\"Core HC Customer Community Plus User\"", "isIfElseBlock" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "ConditionalBlock1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: IP_DataService
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%AccountId%", "InvokeFor" : "Onboarding Case" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "Cases", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_AtGlanceDataServiceIP", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LA_MergeFacilityAndSCP
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "LB_SCP", "LB_Facility" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SplitByChild
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "HospitalApplication" : "=FILTER(LIST(%GetByFacility%),'Subject == \"Hospital Verification & Application\"')", "RRApplication" : "=FILTER(LIST(%GetByFacility%),'Subject == \"MSS Onboarding\"')", "HospitalPrivileging" : "=FILTER(LIST(%GetByFacility%),'Subject == \"Hospital Privileging\"')", "HospitalOrientation" : "=FILTER(LIST(%GetByFacility%),'Subject == \"Hospital Orientation\"')", "PayerEnrollment" : "=FILTER(LIST(%GetByFacility%),'Subject == \"Payer Enrollment\"')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LB_Facility
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "loopList" : "Cases:FacilityCases:Parent", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "loopOutput" : { "HospitalApplication" : "=IF(%SplitByChild:HospitalApplication:Status% ==\"Complete\"&& %SplitByChild:HospitalApplication:ApplicationReceivedDate%!=\"\",\"Complete\", IF(%SplitByChild:HospitalApplication:Status% ==\"In Progress\"&& %SplitByChild:HospitalApplication:ApplicationSentOn%!=\"\",\"In Progress\", \"Not Started\"))", "Type" : "Facility", "Name" : "=%Cases:FacilityCases:Parent:Subject%", "RRApplicationProcessing" : "=%SplitByChild:RRApplication:Status%", "HospitalPrivilaging" : "=IF(%SplitByChild:HospitalPrivileging:Status% ==\"Complete\"&& %SplitByChild:HospitalPrivileging:PriviligeDate%!=\"\",\"Complete\", IF(%SplitByChild:HospitalPrivileging:Status% ==\"In Progress\"&& %SplitByChild:HospitalPrivileging:ApplicationSentDate%!=\"\",\"In Progress\", \"Not Started\"))", "HospitalOrientation" : "=%SplitByChild:HospitalOrientation:Status%", "PayerEnrollment" : "=%SplitByChild:PayerEnrollment:Status%" }, "show" : null, "label" : "LoopBlock1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SubType
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "TrainingSCP" : "=FILTER(LIST(%SplitByType%),'Subject == \"Training & SCP University\"')", "ITAccess" : "=FILTER(LIST(%SplitByType%),'Subject == \"Contract Executed\"')", "HRSetup" : "=FILTER(LIST(%SplitByType%),'Subject == \"HR Setup\"')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: LB_SCP
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "loopList" : "Cases:SCPCases:Parent", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "loopOutput" : { "Type" : "Internal", "Name" : "SCP Onboarding", "TrainingAndSCPUniversity" : "=%SubType:TrainingSCP:Status%", "HRSetup" : "=%SubType:HRSetup:Status%", "ContractExecuted" : "=IF(%SV_RecordCount:ExecuetedContractCount%>0,\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "ITAccessSetup" : "=IF(%SV_RecordCount:ExecuetedContractCount%>0,\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\")" }, "show" : null, "label" : "LoopBlock1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_RecordCount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "ExecuetedContractCount" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contract WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Status = '{1}' AND RecordType.DeveloperName ='{2}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Executed\",\"Clinician\")" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues6", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
